struct CJ_RTCRtpSendParameters {
    var codecs: CPointer<CJ_RTCRtpCodecParameters>
    var codecs_size: Int64
    var headerExtensions: CPointer<CJ_RTCRtpHeaderExtensionParameters>
    var headerExtensions_size: Int64
    var rtcp: CJ_RTCRtcpParameters
    var encodings: CPointer<CJ_RTCRtpEncodingParameters>
    var encodings_size: Int64
    var transactionId: CString
    var transactionId_size: Int64

   public init(codecs: CPointer<CJ_RTCRtpCodecParameters>, codecs_size: Int64, headerExtensions: CPointer<CJ_RTCRtpHeaderExtensionParameters>, headerExtensions_size: Int64, rtcp: CJ_RTCRtcpParameters, encodings: CPointer<CJ_RTCRtpEncodingParameters>, encodings_size: Int64, transactionId: CString, transactionId_size: Int64) {
        this.codecs = codecs
        this.codecs_size = codecs_size
        this.headerExtensions = headerExtensions
        this.headerExtensions_size = headerExtensions_size
        this.rtcp = rtcp
        this.encodings = encodings
        this.encodings_size = encodings_size
        this.transactionId = transactionId
        this.transactionId_size = transactionId_size
    }
}

public class GZIPHeader {
    public var text: Int32              /* true if compressed data believed to be text */
    public var time: Int64              /* modification time */
    public var xflags: Int32            /* extra flags (not used when writing a gzip file) */
    public var os: Int32                /* operating system */
    public var extra: ?Array<Byte>      /* pointer to extra field or Z_NULL if none */
    public var extra_len: UInt32        /* pointer to extra size field or Z_NULL if none */
    public var extra_max: UInt32        /* space at extra (only when reading header) */
    public var name: ?Array<Byte>       /* pointer to zero-terminated file name or Z_NULL */
    public var name_max: UInt32         /* space at name (only when reading header) */
    public var comment: ?Array<Byte>    /* pointer to zero-terminated comment or Z_NULL */
    public var comm_max: UInt32         /* space at comment (only when reading header) */
    public var hcrc: Int32              /* true if there was or will be a header crc */
    public var done: Int64              /* true when done reading gzip header (not used when writing a gzip file) */

    public init() {
        this.text = 0
        this.time = 0
        this.xflags = 0
        this.os = 255
        this.extra = None
        this.extra_len = 0
        this.extra_max = 0
        this.name = None
        this.name_max = 0
        this.comment = None
        this.comm_max = 0
        this.hcrc = 0
        this.done = 0
    }
}

public struct UITheme {
    public let primaryColor: Color
    public let secondaryColor: Color
    public let successColor: Color
    public let errorColor: Color

    public let infoColor: Color

    public init() {
        this.primaryColor = Color.BrightCyan
        this.secondaryColor = Color.BrightBlue
        this.successColor = Color.BrightGreen
        this.errorColor = Color.BrightRed
        this.warningColor = Color.BrightYellow

    }
}

public struct JoyWebSocketCloseStatus {
    public static const NORMAL: UInt16 = 1000
    public static const GOING_AWAY: UInt16 = 1001
    public static const PROTOCOL_ERROR: UInt16 = 1002
    public static const NOT_ACCEPTABLE: UInt16 = 1003
    public static const NO_BAD_DATA: UInt16 = 1007
    public static const POLICY_VIOLATION: UInt16 = 1008
    public static const TOO_BIG_TO_PROCESS: UInt16 = 1009
    public static const REQUIRED_EXTENSION: UInt16 = 1010
    public static const SERVER_ERROR: UInt16 = 1011
    public static const SERVICE_RESTARTED: UInt16 = 1012
    public static const SERVICE_OVERLOAD: UInt16 = 1013
    public static const SESSION_NOT_RELIABLE: UInt16 = 4500
}

public func exponnormPlot() {
    fplot({x => exponnormPDF(x, 0.5)}, -2.0, 8.0).display_name("k = 0.5")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => exponnormPDF(x, 1.0)}, -2.0, 8.0).display_name("k = 1.0")
    fplot({x => exponnormPDF(x, 3.0)}, -2.0, 8.0).display_name("k = 3.0")
    hold(false)
    title("Exponnorm PDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("f(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/exponnorm/exponnormpdf.png", "png")
    clear()

    fplot({x => exponnormCDF(x, 0.5)}, -2.0, 8.0).display_name("k = 0.5")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => exponnormCDF(x, 1.0)}, -2.0, 8.0).display_name("k = 1.0")
    fplot({x => exponnormCDF(x, 3.0)}, -2.0, 8.0).display_name("k = 3.0")
    hold(false)
    title("Exponnorm CDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("F(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/exponnorm/exponnormcdf.png", "png")
    clear()
}

public interface FTPFileEntryParser {
    /**
     * 解析FTP服务器文件列表的一行，并将其转换为 FTPFile 实例形式。
     *
     * 如果文件列表行描述的不是一个文件，则应返回 null，否则将返回表示文本行描述对应的 FTPFile 实例。
     *
     * @param listEntry 来自文件列表的文本行
     * @return 与提供的条目对应的 FTPFile 实例，若无法解析则返回 null
     */
    FTPFile parseFTPEntry(String listEntry);

    /**
     * 为接口的实现者（如 VMSVersioningFTPEntryParser ，或其他实现）提供钩子。
     *
     * 可以执行一些操作，这些操作作用于从服务器流创建 FTPFileList 后，但在任何客户端看到 FTPFileList 之前。
     * 默认实现为空。
     *
     * @param original 从服务器流创建的原始 FTPFileList
     * @return 经过此方法处理后的 FTPFileList
     */
    java.util.LinkedList<String> preParse(java.util.LinkedList<String> original);

    /**
     * 从提供的对象中读取下一个条目内容，直到遇到条目的分隔符。
     *
     * 特定的 ftp 系统的文件条目解析器必须实现这个方法，在一般情况下，可以直接调用
     * StringReader<InputStream>.readln() 来实现。
     *
     * @param reader 从中读取条目的 StringReader 对象
     * @return 表示下一个 ftp 条目的字符串，如果找不到则返回 null
     */
    String readNextEntry(java.io.StringReader reader);
}

public interface FTPFileEntryParser {
    /**
     * 解析FTP服务器文件列表的一行，并将其转换为 FTPFile 实例形式。
     *
     * 如果文件列表行描述的不是一个文件，则应返回 None ，否则将返回表示文本行描述对应的 FTPFile 实例。
     *
     * @param listEntry 来自文件列表的文本行
     *
     * @return 与提供的条目对应的 FTPFile 实例
     */
    func parseFTPEntry(listEntry: String): ?FTPFile

    /**
     * 为接口的实现者（如 VMSVersioningFTPEntryParser ，或其他实现）提供钩子。
     *
     * 可以执行一些操作，这些操作作用于从服务器流创建 {@link FTPFileList} 后，但在任何客户端看到 FTPFileList 之前。\n
     * 默认实现为空。
     *
     * @param original 从服务器流创建的原始 FTPFileList
     * @return 经过此方法处理后的 FTPFileList
     */
    func preParse(original: LinkedList<String>): LinkedList<String>

    /**
     * 从提供的对象中读取下一个条目内容，直到遇到条目的分隔符。
     *
     * 特定的 ftp 系统的文件条目解析器必须实现这个方法，在一般情况下，可以直接调用 StringReader<StreamingSocket>.reader() 来实现。
     *
     * @param reader 从中读取条目的 StringReader 对象
     *
     * @return 表示下一个 ftp 条目的字符串，如果找不到则返回 None
     */
    func readNextEntry(reader: StringReader<InputStream>): ?String
}

public interface IoFilter <: ToString {

    /**
     * 处理入栈消息
     *
     * @throws TransportException
     */
    func inboundMessage(context: IoFilterContext, session: Session): Unit

    /**
     *  处理出栈消息
     *
     * @throws TransportException
     */
    func outboundMessage(context: IoFilterContext, session: Session): Unit
}

public interface Painter {
    /**
     * 绘制填充矩形
     */
    func fillRect(rect: Rect, color: Color): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制矩形边框
     */
    func strokeRect(rect: Rect, color: Color, thickness: Float32): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制圆角矩形
     */
    func fillRoundedRect(rect: Rect, radius: Float32, color: Color): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制填充圆
     */
    func fillCircle(center: Position, radius: Float32, color: Color): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制圆形边框
     */
    func strokeCircle(center: Position, radius: Float32, color: Color, thickness: Float32): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制直线
     */
    func drawLine(start: Position, end: Position, color: Color, thickness: Float32): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制文本
     */
    func drawText(text: String, position: Position, color: Color): Unit

    /**
     * 测量文本尺寸
     */
    func measureText(text: String): Size

    /**
     * 绘制纹理
     */
    func drawTexture(texture: Texture, rect: Rect): Unit

    /**
     * 绘制带色调的纹理
     */
    func drawTextureTinted(texture: Texture, rect: Rect, tint: Color): Unit

    /**
     * 设置裁剪区域
     */
    func setClipRect(rect: Rect): Unit

    /**
     * 清除裁剪区域
     */
    func clearClipRect(): Unit
}

input:
public byte[] digest() {
    this.finalize();
    return new byte[]{
        (byte) (h0 & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h0 >>> 8) & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h0 >>> 16) & 0xFF),
        (byte) (h0 >>> 24),
        (byte) (h1 & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h1 >>> 8) & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h1 >>> 16) & 0xFF),
        (byte) (h1 >>> 24),
        (byte) (h2 & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h2 >>> 8) & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h2 >>> 16) & 0xFF),
        (byte) (h2 >>> 24),
        (byte) (h3 & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h3 >>> 8) & 0xFF),
        (byte) ((h3 >>> 16) & 0xFF),
        (byte) (h3 >>> 24)
    };
}

public struct ActorSupervisionInfo {
    public let actorRef: ActorRef
    public let strategy: SupervisionStrategy
    public let state: SupervisionState
    public let failureCount: Int32
    public let lastFailureTime: Int64
    public let restartCount: Int32
    public let escalationCount: Int32
    public let circuitBreakerOpenTime: Int64

    public init(
        actorRef: ActorRef,
        strategy: SupervisionStrategy,
        state: SupervisionState,
        failureCount: Int32,
        lastFailureTime: Int64,
        restartCount: Int32,
        escalationCount: Int32,
        circuitBreakerOpenTime: Int64
    ) {
        this.actorRef = actorRef
        this.strategy = strategy
        this.state = state
        this.failureCount = failureCount
        this.lastFailureTime = lastFailureTime
        this.restartCount = restartCount
        this.escalationCount = escalationCount
        this.circuitBreakerOpenTime = circuitBreakerOpenTime
    }
}

func drawNRGBASrc(dst: RGBA, r: Rectangle, src: NRGBA, sp: Point): (RGBA, Rectangle) {
    let i0 = (r.min.x - dst.rect.min.x) * 4
    let i1 = (r.max.x - dst.rect.min.x) * 4
    let si0 = (sp.x - src.rect.min.x) * 4
    let yMax = r.max.y - dst.rect.min.y

    var y = r.min.y - dst.rect.min.y
    var sy = sp.y - src.rect.min.y
    let dpix = dst.pix
    let spix = src.pix
    while (y != yMax) {
        let dpis = y * dst.stride
        let spis = sy * src.stride
        var i = i0
        var si = si0
        while (i < i1) {
            let sa = UInt32(spix[spis + i + 3]) * 0x101
            let sr = UInt32(spix[spis + i + 0]) * sa / 0xff
            let sg = UInt32(spix[spis + i + 1]) * sa / 0xff
            let sb = UInt32(spix[spis + i + 2]) * sa / 0xff
            dpix[dpis + i + 0] = UInt8(sr >> 8)
            dpix[dpis + i + 1] = UInt8(sg >> 8)
            dpix[dpis + i + 2] = UInt8(sb >> 8)
            dpix[dpis + i + 3] = UInt8(sa >> 8)
            i += 4
            si += 4
        }
        y++
        sy++
    }
    (dst, r)
}

public func genexponPlot() {

    fplot({x => genexponPDF(x, 3.0, 5.0, 7.0)}, 0.01, 1.0).display_name("a=3, b=5, c=7")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => genexponPDF(x, 5.0, 5.0, 5.0)}, 0.01, 1.0).display_name("a=5, b=5, c=5")
    fplot({x => genexponPDF(x, 7.0, 9.0, 11.0)}, 0.01, 1.0).display_name("a=7, b=9, c=11")
    hold(false)
    ylabel("f(x)")
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/genexpon/genexponpdf.png", "png")
    clear()

    fplot({x => genexponCDF(x, 3.0, 5.0, 7.0)}, 0.01, 1.0).display_name("a=3, b=5, c=7")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => genexponCDF(x, 5.0, 5.0, 5.0)}, 0.01, 1.0).display_name("a=5, b=5, c=5")
    fplot({x => genexponCDF(x, 7.0, 9.0, 11.0)}, 0.01, 1.0).display_name("a=7, b=9, c=11")
    hold(false)
    ylabel("F(x)")
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/genexpon/genexponcdf.png", "png")
    clear()
}

public func powerlognormPlot() {

    fplot({x => powerlognormPDF(x, 1.0, 1.0)}, 0.01, 1.5).display_name("a=b=1")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => powerlognormPDF(x, 3.0, 3.0)}, 0.01, 1.5).display_name("a=b=3")
    fplot({x => powerlognormPDF(x, 5.0, 5.0)}, 0.01, 1.5).display_name("a=b=5")
    hold(false)
    title("powerlognorm PDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("f(x)")
    legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/powerlognorm/powerlognormpdf.png", "png")
    clear()

    fplot({x => powerlognormCDF(x, 1.0, 1.0)}, 0.01, 1.5).display_name("a=b=1")
    hold(true)
    fplot({x => powerlognormCDF(x, 3.0, 3.0)}, 0.01, 1.5).display_name("a=b=3")
    fplot({x => powerlognormCDF(x, 5.0, 5.0)}, 0.01, 1.5).display_name("a=b=5")
    hold(false)
    title("powerlognorm CDF Plot")
    xlabel("x")
    ylabel("F(x)")
    // legend(true)
    save("./tests/imgs/stats/continuous/powerlognorm/powerlognormcdf.png", "png")
    clear()
}

public interface McpSession <: Resource {
    /**
     * 发送 JSON-RPC 请求并等待响应
     *
     * @param method 方法名称
     * @param requestParams 请求参数
     * @return 类型 T 的响应
     */
    func sendRequest<T>(method: String, requestParams: JsonSerializable): T where T <: JsonDeserializable<T>

    /**
     * 发送 JSON-RPC 通知而不等待响应
     *
     * @param method 通知方法名称
     * @param params 通知参数
     */
    func sendNotification(method: String, params: ?JsonSerializable): Unit
    func sendNotification(method: String) {
        sendNotification(method, None)
    }

    /**
     * 为通知方法添加消费者
     *
     * @param method 通知方法名称
     * @param consumer 处理通知字节的消费者函数
     */
    func addNotificationConsumer(method: String, consumer: (Array<Byte>) -> Unit): Unit
}

public class TokenResponse {
    public static let TOKEN_TYPE_BEARER: String = "Bearer"

    static let KEY_REQUEST: String = "request"
    static let KEY_EXPIRES_AT: String = "expires_at"
    static let KEY_TOKEN_TYPE: String = "token_type"
    static let KEY_ACCESS_TOKEN: String = "access_token"
    static let KEY_EXPIRES_IN: String = "expires_in"
    static let KEY_REFRESH_TOKEN: String = "refresh_token"
    static let KEY_ID_TOKEN: String = "id_token"
    static let KEY_SCOPE: String = "scope"
    static let KEY_ADDITIONAL_PARAMETERS: String = "additionalParameters"

    private static let PARAMS_ARRAY: Array<String> = [
            KEY_TOKEN_TYPE,
            KEY_ACCESS_TOKEN,
            KEY_EXPIRES_IN,
            KEY_REFRESH_TOKEN,
            KEY_ID_TOKEN,
            KEY_SCOPE
        ]
    static let BUILT_IN_PARAMS: HashSet<String> = HashSet<String>(PARAMS_ARRAY)

    public let request: TokenRequest
    public let tokenType: String
    public let accessToken: String
    public let accessTokenExpirationTime: Int64
    public let idToken: String
    public let refreshToken: String
    public let scope: String
    public let additionalParameters: Map<String, String>

    init(
        request: TokenRequest,
        tokenType: String,
        accessToken: String,
        accessTokenExpirationTime: Int64,
        idToken: String,
        refreshToken: String,
        scope: String,
        additionalParameters: Map<String, String>
    ) {
    	this.request = request
        this.tokenType = tokenType
        this.accessToken = accessToken
        this.accessTokenExpirationTime = accessTokenExpirationTime
        this.idToken = idToken
        this.refreshToken = refreshToken
        this.scope = scope
        this.additionalParameters = additionalParameters
    }

    /**
     * 获取scope集合
     * @return scope集合
     */
    public func getScopeSet(): Set<String> {
        return AsciiStringListUtil.stringToSet(scope)
    }

    /**
     * 将对象序列化为JSON对象
     * @return JSON对象
     */
    public func jsonSerialize(): JsonObject {
        var json: JsonObject = JsonObject()
        JsonUtil.put(json, KEY_REQUEST, request.jsonSerialize())
        JsonUtil.putIfNotNull(json, KEY_TOKEN_TYPE, tokenType)
        JsonUtil.putIfNotNull(json, KEY_ACCESS_TOKEN, accessToken)
        JsonUtil.putIfNotNull(json, KEY_EXPIRES_AT, accessTokenExpirationTime)
        JsonUtil.putIfNotNull(json, KEY_ID_TOKEN, idToken)
        JsonUtil.putIfNotNull(json, KEY_REFRESH_TOKEN, refreshToken)
        JsonUtil.putIfNotNull(json, KEY_SCOPE, scope)
        JsonUtil.put(json, KEY_ADDITIONAL_PARAMETERS,
                JsonUtil.mapToJsonObject(additionalParameters))
        return json
    }

    /**
     * 将对象序列化为JSON字符串
     * @return JSON字符串
     */
    public func jsonSerializeString(): String {
        return jsonSerialize().toString()
    }

    /**
     * 从JSON对象反序列化为TokenResponse对象
     * @param json JSON对象
     * @return TokenResponse对象
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException 当JSON中未提供token请求时抛出异常
     */
    public static func jsonDeserialize(json: JsonObject): TokenResponse {
        if (!json.containsKey(KEY_REQUEST)) {
        	throw IllegalArgumentException("token request not provided and not found in JSON")
        }

        return TokenResponse(
                TokenRequest.jsonDeserialize(json.get(KEY_REQUEST).getOrThrow().asObject()),
                JsonUtil.getStringIfDefined(json, KEY_TOKEN_TYPE),
                JsonUtil.getStringIfDefined(json, KEY_ACCESS_TOKEN),
                JsonUtil.getInt64IfDefined(json, KEY_EXPIRES_AT),
                JsonUtil.getStringIfDefined(json, KEY_ID_TOKEN),
                JsonUtil.getStringIfDefined(json, KEY_REFRESH_TOKEN),
                JsonUtil.getStringIfDefined(json, KEY_SCOPE),
                JsonUtil.getStringMap(json, KEY_ADDITIONAL_PARAMETERS))
    }

    /**
     * 从JSON字符串反序列化为TokenResponse对象
     * @param jsonStr JSON字符串
     * @return TokenResponse对象
     * @throws NoneValueException 当JSON字符串为空时抛出异常
     */
    public static func jsonDeserialize(jsonStr: String): TokenResponse {
        if (jsonStr.isEmpty()) {
        	throw NoneValueException("jsonStr cannot be null or empty")
        }
        return jsonDeserialize(JsonValue.fromStr(jsonStr).asObject())
    }
}

public class ServerConfig {
    public var maxStreams            : UInt32 = 0
    public var connectionTimeout     : Duration = Duration.second

    public var inTapHandle           : ServerInHandle = ServerInHandle()
    public var statsHandlers         : ArrayList<GrpcHandler> = ArrayList<GrpcHandler>()
    public var keepaliveParams       : ServerParameters = ServerParameters()
    public var keepalivePolicy       : EnforcementPolicy = EnforcementPolicy()
    public var initialWindowSize     : Int32 = 0
    public var initialConnWindowSize : Int32 = 0
    public var writeBufferSize       : Int64 = 0
    public var readBufferSize        : Int64 = 0
    public var maxHeaderListSize     : UInt32 = 0
    public var headerTableSize       : UInt32 = 0

    /**
     * The Function is init constructor
     *
     * @param maxStreams of UInt32, and the Default value is 0
     * @param connectionTimeout of Duration, and the Default value is Duration.second()
     * @param inTapHandle of ServerInHandle, and the Default value is ServerInHandle()
     * @param statsHandlers of ArrayList<GrpcHandler>, and the Default value is ArrayList<GrpcHandler>()
     * @param keepaliveParams of ServerParameters, and the Default value is ServerParameters()
     * @param keepalivePolicy of EnforcementPolicy, and the Default value is EnforcementPolicy()
     * @param initialWindowSize of Int32, and the Default value is 0
     * @param initialConnWindowSize of Int32, and the Default value is 0
     * @param writeBufferSize of Int64, and the Default value is 0
     * @param readBufferSize of Int64, and the Default value is 0
     * @param maxHeaderListSize of UInt32, and the Default value is 0
     * @param headerTableSize of UInt32, and the Default value is 0
     * @since 0.32.5
     */
    public init(
                maxStreams            !: UInt32 = 0,
                connectionTimeout     !: Duration = Duration.second,
                inTapHandle           !: ServerInHandle = ServerInHandle(),
                statsHandlers         !: ArrayList<GrpcHandler> = ArrayList<GrpcHandler>(),
                keepaliveParams       !: ServerParameters = ServerParameters(),
                keepalivePolicy       !: EnforcementPolicy = EnforcementPolicy(),
                initialWindowSize     !: Int32 = 0,
                initialConnWindowSize !: Int32 = 0,
                writeBufferSize       !: Int64 = 0,
                readBufferSize        !: Int64 = 0,
                maxHeaderListSize     !: UInt32 = 0,
                headerTableSize       !: UInt32 = 0){
        this.maxStreams            = maxStreams
        this.connectionTimeout     = connectionTimeout
        this.inTapHandle           = inTapHandle
        this.statsHandlers         = statsHandlers
        this.keepaliveParams       = keepaliveParams
        this.keepalivePolicy       = keepalivePolicy
        this.initialWindowSize     = initialWindowSize
        this.initialConnWindowSize = initialConnWindowSize
        this.writeBufferSize       = writeBufferSize
        this.readBufferSize        = readBufferSize
        this.maxHeaderListSize     = maxHeaderListSize
        this.headerTableSize       = headerTableSize
    }
}

public func getUInt64(): UInt64 {
        checkIndex(positionVal + 8)
        return UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 56 | UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 48 |
            UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 40 | UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 32 |
            UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 24 | UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 16 |
            UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff) << 8 | UInt64(bufferVal[ix(nextGetIndex())] & 0xff)
    }

input:
/**
 * Performs nearest-neighbor RGBA resampling.
 *
 * @param src The source RGBA image data
 * @param out The destination RGBA image data
 * @param scale The scaling factor
 * @param coeffs Boolean coefficients array (unused in nearest-neighbor, but kept for interface compatibility)
 * @param offset Integer offsets array (unused in nearest-neighbor, but kept for interface compatibility)
 * @param filterLength Length of the filter (unused in nearest-neighbor, but kept for interface compatibility)
 */
public static void nearestRGBA(
    RGBA src,
    RGBA out,
    double scale,
    boolean[] coeffs,
    long[] offset,
    long filterLength
) {
    nearestRGBA(
        src.pix,
        src.bounds(),
        src.stride,
        out.pix,
        out.bounds(),
        out.stride,
        scale,
        coeffs,
        offset,
        filterLength
    );
}
output:

        src.pix,
        src.bounds(),
        src.stride,
        out.pix,
        out.bounds(),
        out.stride,
        scale,
        coeffs,
        offset,
        filterLength
